evidence.reason: The official Calamity source places Nightmare Fuel, Endothermic Energy and Darksun Fragment drops in the shared PostDoG conditional drop set.
The official Calamity source adds Meld Blob to the loot of enemies from the Celestial Pillars.
The official source gives Burrower a normal Cavern spawn chance with no progression flag and makes it drop Mysterious Circuitry and Dubious Plating.
The official source gives Ebonian Blight Slime an unconditional Corruption spawn chance, making its Blighted Gel available before bosses.
The official source gives Crimulan Blight Slime an unconditional Crimson spawn chance, making its Blighted Gel available before bosses.
The official boss source places the treasure bag and normal weapon pool behind LastAnLStanding(), so the shared loot becomes available after the Anahita and Leviathan encounter is completed.
The official boss source places the treasure bag and normal weapon pool in the lastWorm conditional set, so they become available when the Astrum Deus encounter is completed.
The official Draedon Bag loot source places Photon Ripper in the Ares-defeated reward set.
The official Draedon Bag loot source places The Jailor in the Ares-defeated reward set.
The official Draedon Bag loot source places Ares Exoskeleton in the Ares-defeated reward set.
The official Draedon Bag loot source places Spine of Thanatos in the Thanatos-defeated reward set.
The official Draedon Bag loot source places Refraction Rotor in the Thanatos-defeated reward set.
The official Draedon Bag loot source places Atlas Munitions Beacon in the Thanatos-defeated reward set.
The official Draedon Bag loot source places Surge Driver in the Artemis and Apollo-defeated reward set.
The official Draedon Bag loot source places The Atom Splitter in the Artemis and Apollo-defeated reward set.
The official Terraria Wiki identifies Antlions as ordinary pre-Hardmode Desert enemies.
The official Terraria Wiki identifies Fire Imps as ordinary pre-Hardmode Underworld enemies.
The official Terraria Wiki identifies Demons as ordinary pre-Hardmode Underworld enemies.
The official Terraria Wiki identifies Voodoo Demons as pre-Hardmode Underworld enemies.
The official Terraria Wiki identifies Bone Serpents as pre-Hardmode Underworld enemies.
The official Terraria Wiki identifies Dark Casters as Dungeon enemies; normal Dungeon access follows Skeletron.
The official Terraria Wiki identifies Wyverns as Hardmode enemies.
The official Terraria Wiki identifies Goblin Summoners as Hardmode Goblin Army enemies.
The official Terraria Wiki identifies Sand Elementals as Hardmode Sandstorm enemies.
The official Terraria Wiki identifies Clingers as Hardmode Corruption enemies.
The official Terraria Wiki identifies Ichor Stickers as Hardmode Crimson enemies.
The official Terraria Wiki identifies Corrupt Mimics as Hardmode enemies.
The official Terraria Wiki identifies Crimson Mimics as Hardmode enemies.
The official Terraria Wiki identifies Hallowed Mimics as Hardmode enemies.
The official Terraria Wiki identifies Deadly Spheres as Martian Madness enemies; the event becomes available after Golem.
The official source gives these enemies ordinary pre-boss biome spawn conditions, and the Starter Bag and pre-Hardmode Sulphurous Crate are available before boss progression.
The official Sea King spawn condition requires both Giant Clam and Desert Scourge to be defeated, placing the encounter and its town shop after Desert Scourge.
The official Acid Rain sources place these enemies in the first event tier, which this profile opens after Eye of Cthulhu.
The official sources spawn these enemies in the upper and middle Abyss layers; the profile follows Calamity's intended post-Skeletron Abyss access point.
CanTownNPCSpawn in the official source requires Skeletron to be defeated and a player to possess a Platinum Coin.
The official source gates these enemies or their biomes and hardmode crate variants behind Hardmode; later conditional loot remains separately gated.
CanTownNPCSpawn in the official source returns downedCryogen.
The official sources place these enemies in the second Acid Rain tier after Aquatic Scourge.
Cataclysm and Catastrophe are parts of the Calamitas Clone encounter in the official source.
The official spawn conditions require Plantera-era progression for these ocean enemies.
The official spawn conditions require Golem to be defeated.
The official source gates the Impious Immolator behind Moon Lord.
The official spawn condition requires Providence to be defeated.
The official Acid Rain progression places these enemies in the post-Polterghast tier.
The official source uses the post-Polterghast Abyss progression for the Eidolon Wyrm encounter.
The official source defines Supreme Calamitas boss loot at completion of the Supreme Calamitas encounter.
The official source defines these as naturally available pre-boss wood, fishing, crate or ordinary cavern-skeleton materials.
The official world-generation source places Abyss Gravel and Planty Mush in the middle Abyss layers, reached at the profile's post-Skeletron Abyss stage.
The Astral Infection and its monolith material become available when Hardmode begins.
Infernal Congealment cannot spawn before Brimstone Elemental is defeated and drops Infernal Suevite, which is required to craft Unholy Core.
Cryonic Ore is generated on Cryogen's first defeat; Cryonic Bars are crafted from that ore.
Perennial Ore is generated on Plantera's first defeat; Perennial Bars are crafted from that ore.
Abyss enemies only drop Scoria Ore after Golem is defeated; Scoria Bars are crafted from that ore.
With Calamity's default early-Hardmode progression enabled, Mythril and Orichalcum generate after the first mechanical boss; this profile's first mechanical boss is The Destroyer.
With Calamity's default early-Hardmode progression enabled, Adamantite and Titanium generate after the second mechanical boss; this profile's second mechanical boss is The Twins.
The Mythril Anvil requires Mythril or Orichalcum bars, which become available after the first mechanical boss under the default progression rework.
The Adamantite Forge requires Adamantite or Titanium ore, which becomes available after the second mechanical boss under the default progression rework.
Great Sand Shark drops Grand Scale, and its official natural-spawn check immediately returns until Plantera has been defeated.
The official item source sets Item.vanity to true. It is cosmetic and must not appear in a combat-equipment profile.
Zen Potion changes enemy spawn frequency and is a farming/exploration utility, not a combat buff.
Zerg Potion changes enemy spawn frequency and is a farming utility, not a combat buff.
Potion of Omniscience combines information and detection effects; it does not improve combat statistics.
Anechoic Coating reduces enemy detection range and is an exploration/avoidance utility rather than combat equipment.
The official source implements the Shady Salesman as a travelling NPC with no boss-progression requirement.
The Sunken Sea schematic and the materials for the first Codebreaker upgrade are available from world-generated laboratories before bosses; recipe ingredients impose any later item-specific gate.
The official Codebreaker source requires only the Decryption Computer for the Planetoid schematic; later recipes remain gated by their own Hardmode ingredients.
Decrypting the Jungle schematic requires the Long Ranged Sensor Array, whose official recipe requires Hardmode Mythril or Orichalcum bars.
Decrypting the Hell schematic requires the Advanced Display; its Life Alloy ingredient becomes available after Scoria Ore at Golem.
Decrypting the Ice schematic requires the Voltage Regulation System, whose official recipe includes post-Providence Uelibloom Bars.
These conditions select a world variant or crafting environment rather than a boss milestone; recipe ingredients still determine progression.
Moon phase and town-NPC presence are repeatable shop timing requirements, not progression milestones.
The shop condition only mirrors an already discovered world item; the original item's source determines its actual availability.
Heart of Darkness and Stress Pills require both Revengeance Mode and Skeletron in the official shop definition.
The official Archmage shop requires all three Frost Moon minibosses; the event is available after Plantera.
The official shop requires carrying Ice Barrage, whose official recipe uses post-Devourer materials.
Both conditional drops are rewards for completing the paired constructs during the Calamitas Clone encounter.
Duke's Decapitator is a Duke Fishron reward in ordinary non-Remix worlds.
The challenge reward cannot exist before Providence is defeated; the additional method restriction does not create a later boss milestone.
The duplicate lambda rules only change drop chance before and after the world-evil boss; the weapons are obtainable from these pre-Hardmode Underworld enemies from the start.
Nuclear Toad and its weapon drop are available in the first Acid Rain tier.
The official Abyss enemy sources gate Abyss Shocker behind Skeletron.
The official Astral enemy loot definitions require Astrum Aureus to be defeated for these combat drops.
The official Mantis Shrimp loot definition requires Plantera for Mantis Claws.
The official loot pool is emitted only when the final member of the Anahita and Leviathan encounter is defeated.
The official loot pool is emitted only by the last surviving Astrum Deus worm.
The source enemy itself appears after Providence, which is later than the Plantera condition on its Hellkite drop.
The official Eidolon Wyrm loot set places Eidolon Staff in its post-Polterghast pool.
These conditions select the final Exo Mech and its reward set within the completed Exo Mechs encounter.
The conditional rewards are part of the completed Supreme Calamitas encounter.
AddRevBagAccessories applies the Revengeance-only Heart of Darkness / Stress Pills pool to boss bags; each bag's own source stage remains the progression gate.
These lambdas select difficulty, mode or encounter variants inside treasure bags; each bag's source stage remains authoritative.
The official world-generation sources place the Brimstone Crag blocks and laboratory materials during world creation, before boss progression.
Pyre Mantle is generated in the middle Abyss layers, using the same post-Skeletron access milestone as the other middle-Abyss materials.
The official sources make these available through pre-boss Sulphurous Sea or Brimstone fishing, Acidwood fruit, the ungated Divine Swine, the Shady Salesman's blender, or an ordinary Forest critter.
The official Sunken Sea fishing pool adds both very-rare catches after Desert Scourge.
These are Astral biome tree fruit or legendary fishing catches; the Astral biome appears when Hardmode begins.
The official Brimstone Crag lava-fishing branch explicitly requires Providence before Bloodfin can be caught.
The official spawn condition requires a Blood Moon after Eye of Cthulhu.
The official locked Astral Chest refuses to open until Astrum Aureus is defeated.
Although generated in the Hell laboratory, the official item cannot be used until the Devourer of Gods has been defeated.
The official world update places Lilies of Finality only after Yharon.
The official Exhumed upgrade table converts their base items through Calamitas's post-boss enchantment service.

evidence.sourceVersion: recommendations snapshot 2.1.2, not progression evidence for Calamity 2.2
evidence.reason: These legacy recommendation entries are display names, grouped armor labels, renamed content or anchors rather than exact current internal IDs. Recommendations remain separate and do not control item availability.
The official Starter Bag source restricts these developer or vanity items to specific player names; they are not normal combat progression equipment.
Wulfrum Fusion Cannon is an internal held-only armor-set item rather than independent equipment, while Lava Chicken Broth is emitted only by the special-seed Exo Mechdusa variant.
This is a special Get fixed boi or Zenith seed drop pool that intentionally bypasses normal progression. The standard-world profile uses the ordinary recipes and sources instead.

warnings: 1 support or agent references are stale
